commit 07c295149d0450b2b1ee71dca72436d75a7d5622
Author: Test User <test@example.com>
Date:   Sun May 3 01:50:26 2026 -0400

    feat(agent): worker server-probe goroutine + best-effort event mirror [ddx-98257c6a]
    
    ADR-022 rev 5 §Probe + freshness state model, step 2. Workers stay
    autonomous against the bead store; in parallel a Probe goroutine
    periodically checks ~/.local/share/ddx/server.addr (XDG-compliant) and,
    on NotConnected→Connected, registers via /api/workers/register and
    mirrors per-attempt loop events to /api/workers/{id}/event best-effort.
    
    Cadence: immediate first probe, then 30s ± 20% jitter; ≥5 consecutive
    failures stretch the next interval to MaxInterval (5min cap); a successful
    probe resets to base. NotConnected events buffer in a 200-entry ring;
    overflow drops oldest and flips HadDroppedBackfill so operators consult
    bead-local logs. /api/workers/{id}/backfill flushes the ring on reconnect.
    
    ddx work --local wires the probe via a TeeJSONL adapter on top of the
    existing loopSink: every writeLoopEvent JSONL line tees through the
    probe as a workerprobe.Event, no changes to the loop body.
    
    Tests:
    - TestWorker_ProbeImmediateFirst, TestWorker_ProbeJitter,
      TestWorker_BackfillOnReconnect, TestWorker_BackoffOnFailures,
      TestWorker_NoServer_StillWorks (unit, fake server).
    - TestWorker_RealAttemptEvents_FlowToServer (wired-in integration):
      builds a fresh ddx, stands up real serverpkg.Server behind
      httptest, points the worker at it via XDG_DATA_HOME server.addr,
      spawns ddx work --local --once against a standard fixture, and
      asserts loop.start + bead.claimed land in
      .ddx/server/worker-events.jsonl within 5s.
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

data.text: All acceptance criteria are already satisfied by code merged in commit 07c29514. The current base (1adb967e) already contains the workerprobe package with all 6 named tests passing including the wired-in integration test. Writing a no_changes rationale with a verification command.

input.content:
verification_command: cd cli && go test -run 'TestWorker_ProbeImmediateFirst|TestWorker_ProbeJitter|TestWorker_BackfillOnReconnect|TestWorker_BackoffOnFailures|TestWorker_NoServer_StillWorks|TestWorker_RealAttemptEvents_FlowToServer' ./internal/agent/workerprobe/...

The bead's implementation already landed in commit 07c29514 ("feat(agent): worker
server-probe goroutine + best-effort event mirror [ddx-98257c6a]") and was
merged to main at 622480a0. That work is part of the current base rev
(1adb967e), so this worktree starts with every artifact the bead asks for:

- cli/internal/agent/workerprobe/probe.go — probe goroutine, jittered 30s
  cadence with immediate first probe, exponential backoff capped at 5min,
  NotConnected→Connected register, Connected→NotConnected worker_id clear,
  200-entry ring buffer with HadDroppedBackfill flag, best-effort event
  POSTs (failures logged + continue).
- cli/internal/agent/workerprobe/probe_test.go — TestWorker_ProbeImmediateFirst,
  TestWorker_ProbeJitter, TestWorker_BackfillOnReconnect,
  TestWorker_BackoffOnFailures, TestWorker_NoServer_StillWorks (AC 1–5).
- cli/internal/agent/workerprobe/probe_integration_test.go —
  TestWorker_RealAttemptEvents_FlowToServer wires a real ddx-server +
  ddx work --local --once worker against a fixture and asserts loop.start /
  bead.claimed / loop.end events flow end-to-end (AC 7).
- cli/cmd/agent_cmd.go — TeeJSONL adapter wires the probe into ddx work.

The earlier REVIEW:BLOCK note ("diff contains only result.json") was from a
re-attempt that ran after the merge, when the worktree base already held the
code; that attempt correctly produced no diff but did not record a rationale,
so the reviewer saw an empty change. This rationale is the explicit record:
no further code change is required because every AC is provably satisfied by
files already in the base, and the verification_command above re-runs the
six AC tests (all PASS, ~6s).

data.text: The bead's work is already in the base (commit 07c29514, merged at 622480a0). All six AC tests pass against the existing code. Wrote `.ddx/executions/20260503T055813-1052994b/no_changes_rationale.txt` with a `verification_command` that re-runs the six named tests.
